headline: Here Are Friday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Adobe, Alcoa, Alphabet, Celanese, Knight-Swift, Linde Plc, Ollie’s Bargain Outlet, Tyson Foods, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher as we get ready to conclude another dreadful week on Wall Street. The song remains the same as soaring oil prices, another week of war with Iran, and rising inflation worries from current levels remain front and center for investors. All four of the major U.S. indices finished ...
